steps.title: Identify the relationship between point values
steps.content:
From the equation 6G + 42R = 336, we can determine the point value of each token color from the coefficient attached to that color.

The term 6G represents 6 points for each green token, and 42R represents 42 points for each red token.

steps.title: Simplify the equation to understand point differences
steps.content: The total of 336 points is not needed to find the difference between the two point values. The coefficients show the per-token values directly: a green token is worth 6 points, and a red token is worth 42 points.

steps.title: Determine the difference in point values
steps.content:
• To find how many more points a red token is worth compared to a green one, subtract the green-token value from the red-token value.

  • This gives $$42-6=36.$$

  • The difference in actual points is calculated directly from the coefficients of the two token variables.
The answer is 36.
